title: PortalMod Extra
description: The 'portalmod' mod with more stuff that the original :D

Thanks to LeVraiRayan for creating the mod, MG for the aperture science glass texture, Mylo for the fixed Portal Gun Pedestal size, AxolotlKirill for helping to the redirection cube, Lemo for doing new & better textures, Mr Ant Tenna for turret redemption line texture... But also to 乃のの丂ｲ乇尺乃ﾑ爪, NullASilly, MG, Mr Ant Tenna, Glados|Foxy, Xoko_Man, Mylo, Crinchy, portalqwest1886, Jah, Ama, PheonX, BBench for every suggestions they give! But also to you user! To playing the mod!
